name: Cintya Lara Flores
bio: Cintya has experience as a Data Analysis Assistant and QA Tester, where she developed strong analytical and problem-solving skills. During the project, she discovered a passion for frontend development and UI/UX design, contributing to the creation of user-friendly interfaces and ensuring a seamless user experience. Outside of work, she enjoys playing video games, collecting and playing Magic: The Gathering and exploring the work of J.R.R. Tolkien through books, films, and collectibles.
contributions: Led UI/UX design and development across key application pages, including Home, About Us, Login, multiple Data Dashboards (Energy, Water Level, Ambient & Wall Temperature), Staff Welcome, and Developers pages.
Implemented responsive and dynamic interfaces using modern frontend practices, ensuring consistency and accessibility across devices.
Designed and developed reusable, scalable components such as navigation bars, footers, modular UI elements, dashboard layouts, and date pickers
Developed and integrated navigation logic, state-driven rendering, and real-time data visualization to enhance user interaction and usability.
Applied input validation and quality assurance practices to ensure data accuracy, reliability, and a seamless user experience.

name: Temi Bankole
bio: Temi Bankole is a second-year Software Development student at SAIT with a strong foundation in UI/UX design, object oriented programming, and databases. Outside of tech, she has worked as a lifeguard, multi-sport camp coach, and restaurant server through these variety of experiences she has become a natural leader and team player. When she's not coding, she's passionate about playing volleyball for the Trojans and writing poems. She brings a people-first mindset and contagious energy to everything she takes on.
contributions: Led admin account management end-to-end, building Manage, Create, and Edit Staff pages with dynamic routing, live validation, status control, and change detection.
Developed a custom dashboard system and Natural Gas Dashboard with configurable charts (sensors, date ranges, aggregations), persisted settings, export functionality, and user feedback modals.
Built key staff and user features, including Reports (sensor-based configuration and PDF generation), Staff Profile management, Guest Energy Trends, and password recovery flows.

Emphasized UX quality and consistency, implementing form validation, input/date guardrails, content-safety checks, clear notifications, and reusable components (navigation, footer, dashboard layouts).

name: Dominique Lee
bio: Dominique is a Software Development student at SAIT with experience working on web applications and dashboards using tools such as C#, JavaScript, React, SQL, HTML, and CSS. She enjoys building user-friendly interfaces and continuously improving her technical skills through hands-on projects. Outside of school, she enjoys K-pop and watching K-dramas and C-dramas.
contributions: Developed Ambient Temperature and Wall Temperature dashboards for data visualization and analysis.
Implemented Guest Energy Trends dashboard with filtering and trend insights.
Built Edit Staff Profile and Admin Edit Staff features for user management.
Contributed to project documentation and overall system refinement.

name: Anna Yabut
bio: Anna focuses on backend development and cloud infrastructure. She ensures our systems are reliable and efficient.

name: Kiera Johnson
bio: Kiera focuses on database design and backend development. She ensures our data is organized and accessible.
contributions: Responsible for testing and quality assurance
Ensures our product meets the highest standards
